65203898.title: Luz Noceda

pageprops.wikibase-shortdesc: Fictional character from The Owl House

65203898.description: Fictional character from The Owl House
65203898.extract: Luz Noceda is the protagonist of the Disney Channel animated series The Owl House, created by Dana Terrace. She is voiced by Sarah-Nicole Robles. Luz was well-received by both critics and fans of the show, who praised her neurodiversity, overall character, coming-of-age arc and Robles' vocal performance.
